Defendant Cyril Hackett Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Subpoena Duces Tecum To Patricia Hackett
Off Calendar Feb-24-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling for Defendant Cyril Hackett's Motion To Enforce Subpoena Duces Tecum To Patricia Hackett. The Motion to Enforce Subpoenas to Patricia and Paul Hackett are denied, without prejudice. The Court exercises its discretion to deny all requests for sanctions. Prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
